testsuite.name: APITests.books.BooksSchemaValidation
testsuite.system-out:
Token intento 1 | status: 201 HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 417 Connection: keep-alive Date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 15:40:31 GMT X-Amzn-Trace-Id: Root=1-69c7f66f-2a5329e0151c53ec2bdd2cd5;Parent=61db7c6531585dfe;Sampled=0;Lineage=1:9ee0f5ed:0 x-amzn-RequestId: aea24f88-1e78-46c2-979e-a37ab331f206 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Amz-Date, X-Api-Key, X-Amz-Security-Token x-amz-apigw-id: a8NxgGxPIAMEMdw= Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH X-Cache: Miss from cloudfront Via: 1.1 5b4019b3116ea3434f9c081893a525ea.cloudfront.net (CloudFront) X-Amz-Cf-Pop: LIM50-P4 X-Amz-Cf-Id: Szpvgzlreq7DAYIViqlZIQq--s_5tgoU_ivNARxb5bDT7XGLtxqoFw==
[ { "id": 1, "name": "The Russian", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 3, "name": "The Vanishing Half", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 4, "name": "The Midnight Library", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 6, "name": "Viscount Who Loved Me", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 2, "name": "Just as I Am", "type": "non-fiction", "available": false }, { "id": 5, "name": "Untamed", "type": "non-fiction", "available": true } ] Token intento 1 | status: 201 HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 417 Connection: keep-alive Date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 15:40:40 GMT X-Amzn-Trace-Id: Root=1-69c7f678-3bfde73e2e5dfdc809c751ab;Parent=789d2408cc99ecf9;Sampled=0;Lineage=1:9ee0f5ed:0 x-amzn-RequestId: a1f370d4-26fc-4ac3-bd20-b154c070139f Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Amz-Date, X-Api-Key, X-Amz-Security-Token x-amz-apigw-id: a8Ny4ESsIAMEl0g= Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH X-Cache: Miss from cloudfront Via: 1.1 4b41c6e76d8872ab0e8baee30184397a.cloudfront.net (CloudFront) X-Amz-Cf-Pop: LIM50-P4 X-Amz-Cf-Id: ynbuTfLPiM_DuTX7qMArAKz5hic79LdWj3XLYcXGyyhCfPQukGEMRg==
